---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One sentence describing what you want.

## Problem It Solves

What gap does this fill? What can't you do today?

## Proposed Solution

How you'd expect it to work. Include example CLI flags, config YAML, or API if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Links to related tools, papers, CVEs, or prior art that informed this request.
